textByHash.65469b0a0e20c2b58bc60e59433f57b92be0b7d1: Heya! What can I get you?
textByHash.56ffeb84aa2e9f5afb5513e491914d8098a6e677: Well, we've got Asgarnian Ale, Wizard's Mind Bomb and Dwarven Stout, all for only 3 coins.
textByHash.a3f0b9f6a189accba4fc43a20cd132851be75621: I said 3 coins! You haven't got 3 coins!
textByHash.7e1c018f4157f48018738d63f3e335cd0955fc2e: We'll buy it for a couple of coins if you're interested.
textByHash.747497fc48747d0b03884c5414ecf9f7cccf9f60: Ooh, we'll buy those off you if you're interested. 2 coins per glass.
textByHash.f1753910370e26ec4d069c8ec1b46f669444d89a: Have you heard? Someone's planning a big party!
textByHash.5982f084dcd9ab5a2ac43a35e8fc57d6a89a43a6: Someone's put something very valuable into the party room drop chest! If you go to the party room and pull the lever you might have a chance to get it!
textByHash.cbe6d94e70f06317847f2945fa0da77376a1fa91: It could be your lucky day!
textByHash.e72f34acfbf796b9746bc254e3de744bb792ccb2: No thanks, I don't need that.
textByHash.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.fad6aa2a525f2076bb2f226e83381389efcf1f14: Something's happening in the party room!
textByHash.c867ee502d4ae2015c97f79712b32d16ae31dd23: Everyone get to the party room!
textByHash.554c0b3373f8a950084c152f7a74034decb1054b: What's happening in the party room?
textByHash.7063e9aab6ee66bf02d3b5cc19ad0186aca1fe7c: Get to the party room NOW!
textByHash.82b6c1de93b3cc2c9c5900f73dac304d73c6580e: Get to the party room quick!
textByHash.7fa8ced345fd888ea1e0dfc6600a0618683f518d: Big value items in the party room now!
textByHash.435f720e7200b358882db130256e630747329c74: Quick! Get to the party room!
